chair.source: Modern_Office_Singles_32x32_101.png (gray office swivel chair, front view, trimmed)

computer.source: Modern_Office_Singles_32x32_129.png (monitor with active blue screen, front, trimmed)

bookshelf.source: Modern_Office_Singles_32x32_183.png (tan office filing/storage cabinet, trimmed). NOTE: closed filing cabinet, not an open bookshelf - pack has no clean modern open bookshelf

whiteboard.source: Modern_Office_Singles_32x32_170.png (blank presentation board / projector screen, trimmed)

door.source: moderninteriors animated_door_4_32x32.png frame 0 (closed brown wood door with glass pane). Full sheet is 160x64 = 5 open-animation frames of 32x64 if door animation is wanted

printer.source: Modern_Office_Singles_32x32_323.png (office printer/copier with paper output, trimmed)

emotes.source: moderninteriors UI_thinking_emotes_animation_32x32.png - extracted single frames (alert=red ! cell0,5; think=... cell2,9; question=blue ? cell2,5; sleep=Z cell6,5; heart=cell4,2; bubble=empty cell6,4; alert_yellow=cell1,4; question_yellow=cell2,6) composited into a 8x1 strip

computer.source: moderninteriors animated_control_room_facebook_scrolling_32x32.png (desktop monitor + keyboard with scrolling on-screen content, 384x64 = 12 frames of 32x64). Monitor occupies top tile, keyboard+mouse bottom tile
